productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual White Shoe
description: Composition:The shoe sole is made of rubber and the upper PU is synthetic.Shoe care:Use a soft clean cloth to wipe away dust. Do not machine wash. Fitting:Regular.These cool white numero uno sneakers with black and white striped cushioning on the inside and bold embroidered logo on the outside has instant appeal. Team it up with casuals to create a confident statement. Wear them confidently the next time you hang out with friends at the mall or go to the movies.
